creator: joseph.scott@owp.csus.edu
text:
Correct WWW in description of sysutils/wmhm

diff -urN sysutils/wmhm/pkg/DESCR.orig sysutils/wmhm/pkg/DESCR
--- sysutils/wmhm/pkg/DESCR.orig        Thu Jan 20 10:03:53 2000
+++ sysutils/wmhm/pkg/DESCR     Thu Jan 20 10:04:08 2000
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 cpu temperature, fan speeds and a voltmeter in a nice looking WindowMaker dock 
 app.
 
-WWW: http://www.mongol.dhis.org/wmhm/
+WWW: http://www.d.umn.edu/~bjarvis/wmlm/wmlm.html
 
 - mikem
 mmuir@es.co.nz

Fix: Correct WWW in description of sysutils/wmhm
